prompt: The user says 'the sidebar layout needs to change from vertical to horizontal'. Iterate on the plan to accommodate this vague feedback.
expected_output: Questions the vague feedback before making changes. Asks clarifying questions about which sidebar, what horizontal means in context, and impact on other phases.
expectations: Does not immediately rewrite the plan based on vague feedback
Asks clarifying questions (which sidebar, what does horizontal mean, scope of change)
Follows the 'Be Skeptical' philosophy â€” questions vague feedback and verifies feasibility
Follows the 'Be Interactive' philosophy â€” confirms understanding before making changes
Only proceeds with plan changes after getting clear answers
